propositions: Rework the merge-gate and snapshot ledger to the approved epic design (AC8/AC9) replacing the divergent delivered schema and verdict set.
Cut over the write-seam to stamp author_sig via the in-toto Statement envelope (sign_event_authorship) instead of raw-bytes sign_authorship.
Rewire the merge-gate to use commit-ancestry (verify_authorship_at_commit) and in-toto content-binding, replacing the removed epoch API.
Introduce a four-way verdict classification adding key_not_valid_at_era to distinguish signatures valid by a keyring key but not at the event's commit.
Change the authorship_ledger wire format to {event_uuid, content_hash, signature, signer_pubkey, position} with self-contained ledger verification, recording null signer_pubkey as bad-signature.
Add create_placeholder as an idempotent alias over ensure_identity_for and re-export it as top-level rebar.create_placeholder, leaving verify_signature_result.schema.json untouched.
